title: Development Multiverse OCs
description: A Mod About Weapons, Trees and Milkshakes!
body:
By The Team who brough you TFNAFM! We bring you a new spectacular mod!

This Mod adds a lot of crazy new things such as:

- Poly Trees!
- Cobalt Ore
- Ruby Ore
- Glowing Obsidian and Crying Obsidian
- New Weapons Like Hammers and Scythes!

And a lot of more!



The Mod is still work in progress! and stuff are always Subject to change!

Credits:

Mephilis - Code/Assets

Drloganblox07 - Assets

StefanJ2_/BetterVanillaBuilding - Original Cobalt and Ruby armour and tools designs

Agmas - Code Help



(this mod was made for an SMP me and logan play on)
